name: Conway Twitty Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a bowl, mix together the butter, flour, and pecans until combined.
3. Press the mixture into a greased 9 x 13 pan.
4. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
5. While the cake is baking, whip half of the Cool Whip with the cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
6. Spread the whipped topping evenly over the baked cake layer.
7. In a separate bowl, beat together the instant vanilla pudding, instant chocolate pudding, and milk until well combined.
8. Pour the pudding mixture over the cream cheese layer.
9. Top with the remaining half of the Cool Whip before serving.
